prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.8 kg; Height 179.9 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 300mg/dL; 9 months ago 242mg/dL; 6 months ago 303mg/dL; 3 months ago 242mg/dL; current 254mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.9kg; 9 months ago 57.2kg; 6 months ago 60.2kg; 3 months ago 57.9kg; current 60.8kg), Height (12 months ago 179.9cm; 9 months ago 179.9cm; 6 months ago 179.9cm; 3 months ago 179.9cm; current 179.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 95U/L; 9 months ago 93U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 97U/L; current 102U/L), AST (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 58U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 58U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 80mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; current 77mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 109mg/g; 9 months ago 79mg/g; 6 months ago 77mg/g; 3 months ago 76mg/g; current 98mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.8g/dL; 6 months ago 15.1g/dL; 3 months ago 15.8g/dL; current 15.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.99 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
